home.tagline: Pick a quiz, race the clock, see who comes out on top.
home.noPopularQuizzes: No quizzes have been played yet. Check back soon.
home.demoLine1: This is the Top Banana! demo. Everything resets daily.
home.demoLine2: The button signs you in to a shared host account with no sign-up, so you can build and host a quiz.
home.demoButton: Sign in and host a quiz
allQuizzes.tagline: Every quiz, ordered by most recently updated.
allQuizzes.empty: No quizzes have been published yet.
login.heading: Log in
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Sign in to manage your quizzes.
register.heading: Register
register.subtitle: Sign up with your email and a password to get started.
register.name: Name
register.nameHint: Leave blank to use a generated name.
forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.heading: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentNotice: If an account matches, we've sent a reset link to its email.
resetPassword.heading: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Pick a fresh one.
resetPasswordInvalid.heading: Link is no longer valid
resetPasswordInvalid.body: This reset link has expired or was already used. Request a fresh one and try again.
verifyEmailPending.heading: Verify your email
verifyEmailPending.sentTo: We sent a confirmation link to
verifyEmailPending.sentAfter: Click it to finish setting up your account.
verifyEmailPending.noEmailOnFile: No email on file. Sign out and register again.
verifyEmailPending.slowDownResend: Slow down: wait a moment before requesting another email.
verifyEmailPending.sendFailed: Could not send the email right now. Try again in a moment.
verifyEmailPending.sent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
verifyEmailRequest.heading: Resend verification email
verifyEmailRequest.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send a fresh verification link.
verifyEmailRequest.sentNotice: If an account matches, we've sent a verification link to its email.
acceptInvite.heading: Accept your invite
acceptInvite.subtitle: Pick a display name and a password to set up your account.
acceptInviteInvalid.heading: Invite link is no longer valid
acceptInviteInvalid.body: This invite has expired or was already used. Ask whoever invited you to send a fresh one.
accessDenied.heading: Access denied
accessDenied.subtitle: This area requires an admin account.
accessDenied.onlyAdmins: but the page you tried to open is only available to admins.
profile.heading: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your account settings.
profile.nameHint: This is the name your leaderboard rows are shown under.
profile.displayNameTaken: That name is already taken. Pick a different one.
profileEmail.subtitle: Switch the address tied to your account.
profileEmail.newEmailHint: We'll send a verification link to the new address. Your account email switches when you click that link, not before.
profileEmail.passwordHint: Confirm your current password to start an email change.
profileEmail.providerManaged: Your email is managed by your sign-in provider and can't be changed here.
profileEmail.changeRequested: If {email} is not already in use, we sent it a verification link. Click the link to switch your email.
profilePassword.subtitle: Pick a fresh password. Other signed-in sessions will be signed out.
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {n} characters.
validation.passwordTooLong: Password must be at most {n} characters.
login.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a moment.
register.displayNameTaken: That display name is already taken.
acceptInvite.title: Invite
acceptInvite.displayNameTaken: That display name is already taken. Pick another.
acceptInvite.emailTaken: An account already exists for this email. Sign in instead.
verifyEmail.title: Verify email
verifyEmail.missingMessage: This verification link is missing its token. Use the link from the email exactly as it was sent.
verifyEmail.verifiedMessage: Your email address is confirmed. You can now use everything Top Banana! has to offer.
verifyEmail.alreadyMessage: This email address was already verified. You can carry on.
verifyEmail.takenMessage: That email is already attached to another account. Submit the change again with a different address.
verifyEmail.invalidMessage: This verification link has expired or was never issued. Sign in to request a fresh one.
verifyEmail.notFoundMessage: This verification link can no longer be applied. Sign in to request a fresh one.
google.signInFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
google.verifyFailed: Could not verify your Google sign-in.
google.emailNotVerified: Your Google account email is not verified. Verify it with Google and try again.
google.registrationDisabled: Registration is currently disabled. Ask an administrator for an account.
google.blocked: Sign-in blocked: your email is not verified. Try requesting a verification link.

leaderboard.beFirst: No finishers yet. Be the first.
hud.question: Q
claim.title: Pick a display name
claim.help: This is the name that will appear on the leaderboard.
claim.saveError: Couldn't save your name. Try again later.
claim.alreadyNamed: This account already has a name.
join.heading: Join a game
join.enterCodePrompt: Enter the room code shown on the screen.
join.namePrompt: Pick a name everyone will see in the lobby.
join.sessionClosed: This game is no longer available.
join.waitingStartGame: Waiting for the host to start the game...
join.waitingStartQuiz: Waiting for the host to start a quiz...
join.bigScreenHint: Look at the big screen for the question.
join.answerError: Couldn't submit your answer. Tap again to retry.
join.answerLocked: Answer locked in, waiting for everyone else...
join.nextRoundComing: The next round is coming up.
join.waitingNextQuiz: Waiting for the host to start the next quiz...
join.exitConfirmBody: You will drop out of the lobby and your roster row will be removed. You can rejoin with the same code.
join.readyError: Couldn't update your ready state. Try again.
join.joinError: Couldn't join the game. Try again.
join.noGameFound: No game found with that code.
email.verify.subject: Confirm your Top Banana! email
email.verify.body:
Welcome to Top Banana!

Click the link below to confirm your email address:

{link}

This link is valid for 24 hours. If you did not sign up, you can ignore this email.
email.emailChangeVerify.subject: Confirm your new Top Banana! email
email.emailChangeVerify.body:
Someone (hopefully you) asked to change a Top Banana! account email to {pendingEmail}.

Click the link below to confirm the change:

{link}

This link is valid for 24 hours. If you did not request the change, you can ignore this email and the account email will stay as it is.
email.reset.subject: Reset your Top Banana! password
email.reset.body:
We received a request to reset your Top Banana! password.

Click the link below to choose a new one:

{link}

This link is valid for 30 minutes. If you did not request a reset, you can ignore this email.
email.invite.subject: You are invited to Top Banana!
email.invite.body:
You have been invited to join Top Banana!

Use the link below to choose a display name and password and set up your account:

{link}

This link is valid for 7 days. If you were not expecting this invite, you can ignore this email.
email.emailChangeNotice.subject: Email change requested for your Top Banana! account
email.emailChangeNotice.body:
Someone requested to change the email on your Top Banana! account to {newEmail}.

Your account email has not changed yet; it only changes when the verification link sent to the new address is clicked.

If this was you, no action is needed. If it was not you, change your password now to secure your account.
email.registerExisting.subject: Someone tried to register with your Top Banana! email
email.registerExisting.body:
Someone tried to create a Top Banana! account with this email address.

An account already exists for this address. If it was you, sign in or reset your password instead.

If it was not you, no action is needed.
email.roleChange.subject: Your Top Banana! account role changed
email.roleChange.body:
An administrator changed the role on your Top Banana! account to {role}.

If you have questions about this change, contact the site administrator.
